steps.canonical_text: Ask if they are choking. If they can cough or speak, encourage them to keep coughing forcefully.
If they cannot cough, speak, or breathe, lean them forward and give up to 5 back blows firmly between the shoulder blades with the heel of your hand.
If the object is not out, stand behind them, place a fist just above the navel, and give up to 5 abdominal thrusts inward and upward.
Keep alternating 5 back blows and 5 abdominal thrusts until the object comes out, they can breathe, or they become unresponsive.
If they become unresponsive, call emergency services now, lower them to the floor, and start chest compressions.
